{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Ninecloud Soulsmiths
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Ninecloud Soulsmiths]] allow [[Lindon]] to use [[dead matter]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c16">''Uncrowned'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
